steps.title: Use area scale factor
steps.content: Surface area is two-dimensional, so it scales by the square of the edge-length scale factor. The edge-length scale factor from cube X to cube Y is $$\frac{5}{84}$$

steps.title: Square the edge factor
steps.content: Square the linear scale factor to get $n$: $$n=(\frac{5}{84})^2=\frac{25}{7{,}056}$$ The answer is A.
